landing.heroDesc: Empowering confident thinkers and future leaders through modern education rooted in Ethiopian culture. A thriving international community of passionate educators.

values.title: Core Values
values.integrityDesc: Doing what is right — always. We encourage honesty and responsibility.
values.leadershipDesc: Teamwork and projects that build confidence and empathy.
values.growthDesc: Setting goals, working hard, and learning from every challenge.
values.lifelongDesc: Encouraging curiosity and creativity beyond the classroom.

founder.subtitle: A Legacy of Excellence
founder.title: Message from the Founders
founder.quote: "Abdi Adama School was established in 1998 E.C. (2005/2006 G.C.) with a dream to create a place where children feel seen, supported, and encouraged to discover their full potential. To build the future of our children, we must plant the seeds of excellence today."
founder.name: Ato Girma Lemi
founder.vision: Our vision is to inspire each student to think boldly, act responsibly, and dream fearlessly. We proudly honor Ethiopian culture, identity, and tradition while delivering international quality education.

media.cultureDesc: Watch our community celebrate Ethiopian culture through dance and music.
media.introDesc1: At Abdi Adama School, we are committed to nurturing young minds and helping every student reach their full potential. Our experienced teachers provide a supportive and engaging environment, combining quality education with values that shape responsible and confident individuals.
media.introDesc2: Whether in academics, arts, or sports, our students are encouraged to explore their talents and develop skills that prepare them for future success.

programs.subtitle: Educational Journey
programs.title: Academic Programs
programs.kindergartenDesc: Playful activities to build basic literacy, numeracy, and social skills.
programs.elementaryDesc: Core subjects with a focus on computer literacy and digital skills.
programs.highSchoolDesc: College-prep courses in science, math, and humanities.

branches.subtitle: Visit Us
branches.title: Our School Branches
branches.kebele10Desc: Our central learning hub and foundational campus.
branches.mogoroDesc: Modern campus serving growing educational needs.
branches.village180Desc: Accessible campus with strong community ties.
branches.awashDesc: Serene environment focused on intellectual curiosity.

cta.title: Ready to shape your
cta.desc: Join thousands of families who trust Abdi Adama School for a high-quality, modern, and value-based education.

footer.tagline: Empowering the next generation with knowledge, values, and vision.
footer.rights: © 2026 ABDI ADAMA SCHOOL • MADE IN ADAMA
footer.founded: Founded in 2005, Abdi Adama School is a premier educational institution in Ethiopia dedicated to producing competent and patriotic citizens.

landing.nurturingMinds: Nurturing bright minds with care and purpose since 2005.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.roleHint: Login auto-detects Super Admin, School Admin, Teacher, Student, Parent, Finance, Clinic, Librarian, VP, and Driver.
login.error: Invalid credentials. Please check your Digital ID.

dashboard.aggregateDesc: This view is intentionally network-wide: no school notices, no local watchlist, and no branch clutter. It is the command surface for the entire school group.
dashboard.branchDesc: High-level health check for this campus. Only what matters in 5 seconds.

registration.title: Student Registration
registration.subtitle: Manage admissions, transcript approvals, and student promotion.
registration.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or Digital ID...

finance.title: Financial Management
finance.subtitle: Track revenue, expenses, and payroll across the school network.
finance.auditSubtitle: A cryptographic, append-only record of every change made to the financial system.

websitePosts.title: Public Website Posts
websitePosts.subtitle: Manage updates shown on the school landing page.
websitePosts.noPosts: No public posts yet. Add one to show on the landing page!

driverPortal.title: Logistics Dashboard
driverPortal.subtitle: Post real-time updates for parents and staff. Keep everyone informed about routes, delays, and arrivals.
driverPortal.addModalSubtitle: Broadcast to Admin, VP, Parents & Students
driverPortal.formStationsHelp: Comma-separated names of places you wait for students

parentPortal.title: Family Dashboard
parentPortal.subtitle: Your central hub for tracking educational milestones, health updates, and school announcements.
parentPortal.clickToView: Click to view full academic profile & comm. book
parentPortal.clinicDesc: Direct encrypted line to our medical staff. Real-time updates on your child's health and well-being.
parentPortal.noLogs: No communication logs found for this student.
parentPortal.selectYear: Select an academic year to view historical performance.
